---
title: "Political Pathology Workbench"
---

::: {.callout-warning}
This project is an active research spike. Materials may be incomplete, provisional, or under review. Public availability does not imply scholarly finality.
:::

The Political Pathology Workbench studies how symbolic orders become embodied in institutions, how those institutions respond to crisis, and when they generate sacrifice, reform, collapse, transformation, or stagnation.

The current spike proves a thin end-to-end workflow: Source -> Passage -> Claim -> Interpretation -> Score -> Case Page.
